sprint.goal: Reduce false-positive governance denials blocking swarm agents: fix agent-identity-bridge chicken-and-egg (#1182) + add safe-subshell allowlist for $(date ...) false positive (#1139).

senior.title: Fix false-positive governance denials: agent-identity invariant + command scanner safe-subshell allowlist
senior.note: #1182 is highest priority (P1) — blocks ALL scheduled agents from setting persona identity. Invariant fires on writes to .agentguard/persona.env via write-persona.sh. Fix: exempt agent-identity bootstrap path in no-governance-self-modification invariant. #1139 is P2 — command scanner in packages/matchers/src/command-scanner.ts over-matches $(date +format) as dangerous shell expansion. Fix: add read-only subshell pattern allowlist.

coverageGaps.description: no-governance-self-modification invariant blocks .agentguard/persona.env writes — no acceptance test for allowlist behavior yet
$(date +format) blocking source not found in TS/Go codebase — may be emitted by AI safety layer, not AgentGuard. Needs investigation by senior engineer.
